name: Placeholders.Block

aliases.name: Block
aliases.comment:
Represents the configuration for a text block placeholder.
It has the following attributes:

  - `backgroundColor`: takes a `Css.Color` and represents the background color of the lines.
  - `height`: takes a `Css.Px` and represents the height of the lines.
  - `items`: a list of integers which is used to randomize the number of lines.
aliases.type: { backgroundColor : Css.Color, height : Css.Px, items : List.List Basics.Int }

values.name: default
values.comment: Returns a default configuration for a block placeholder.

values.name: init
values.comment: Inits a block placeholder shuffling its items.

values.name: update
values.comment: Block update.

values.name: view
values.comment: Renders a block placeholder using the given configuration.

values.name: withItems
values.comment: Adds `items` to a `Block`.
